show_customer.description: Retrieve a list of customers, optionally paginated or filtered by search value or status.

get_customer_profile.description: Get the detailed profile of a specific customer using their ID.

payment_history.description: Retrieve the payment history logs for a specific customer.

get_recent_payment.description: Get a list of all recent payments made across the entire system.

get_unpaid_customers.description: Retrieve a list of customers who have unpaid or outstanding dues.

show_subscription.description: Retrieve active subscription details for a specific customer.

get_pending_subscriptions.description: Retrieve a list of pending/not-yet-activated subscriptions across the system.

get_complaint.description: Retrieve a list of all customer complaints, including their status and details.

complaint_status_count.description: Get count of customer complaints grouped by status (Open, Closed, In Progress).

overdues.description: Retrieve overdue summary counts and a list of overdue customers.

get_single_stb.description: Retrieve set-top box details for a customer.

get_customer_status_count.description: Get count of customers grouped by status (Active, Inactive, Suspended, Archived, etc.).

get_connection_data.description: Get subscription counts by connection type and system-wide monthly collections.

get_dashboard_data.description: Get high-level dashboard data: complaints summary, expired/upcoming subscriptions, collections today/this month, and customer counts.

package_report.description: Retrieve package distribution report showing unit price, invoice count, and revenue per package.

wallet_report.description: Retrieve wallet balance transactions and balances per customer.

view_area.description: Retrieve a list of all areas/zones registered in the system.

view_package.description: Retrieve a list of all packages registered in the system.
